positive: A highly stylized, bold silhouette illustration of a fantastical jungle animal, specifically a jaguar coiled around vibrant monstera leaves and deep tropical flora. The style should be a modern woodcut print design, utilizing thick, clean lines and strong black negative space against a limited color palette of emerald green, turquoise, and burnt orange. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, designed to look excellent on a t-shirt print. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting that emphasizes the shapes and outlines. Flat graphic design aesthetics with depth achieved through layering and contrast, suitable for direct-to-garment printing.
